mapper.update: UPDATE martyr SET photo = #{photo}, name = #{name}, hometown = #{hometown}, gender = #{gender}, politics_status = #{politicsStatus}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, dept = #{dept}, position = #{position}, achievement = #{achievement}, death_date = #{deathDate}, death_campaign = #{deathCampaign}, death_address = #{deathAddress}, bury_point = #{buryPoint}, deeds = #{deeds}, update_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
